title: Elevion Group and AB Join Forces for Five New Biomethane Plants in Italy: Expected Reduction of 50,000 Tons of COâ‚‚ Emissions.
content: Elevion Group, a leading European provider of end-to-end decarbonization and higher energy efficiency solutions, and AB, a global leader in sustainable energy solutions, have announced the signing of a framework agreement for the construction and maintenance of five biogas upgrading plants to biomethane in the regions of Emilia-Romagna, and Lombardy. The project is expected to have a significant environmental impact, with an estimated annual savings of 50,000 tons of COâ‚‚ equivalent.
author: Analysts Account
